title: Show which columns are linked to automations from the table view
excerpt: I have a large board with many automations, i’d like to see which columns are linked to automations to ensure that these columns aren’t deleted when making changes. Maybe a different colour column header or a notificatio…

posts.author: TimPank (Timothy Pankhurst)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a large board with many automations, i’d like to see which columns are linked to automations to ensure that these columns aren’t deleted when making changes. Maybe a different colour column header or a notification to say that the column is linked to an automation and if it is deleted the automation will not continue to work.
